title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Kale Consultants. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
